mapper.select: select user_id, screen_name, hourly_sentiment_stddev, night_post_ratio, region_diversity_score, top_region_avg_score, sentiment_leverage, cluster_id, prob_0, prob_1, prob_2, prob_3, update_time from user_gmm_profile order by user_id asc

select user_id, screen_name, hourly_sentiment_stddev, night_post_ratio, region_diversity_score, top_region_avg_score, sentiment_leverage, cluster_id, prob_0, prob_1, prob_2, prob_3, update_time from user_gmm_profile where user_id = #{userId}
